---
title: "Sales Dashboard"
code-fold: true
---

## SME Annual Financial Overview

This dashboard presents a financial overview of a small-to-medium enterprise (SME),
analysing monthly revenue, costs and profit across a full calendar year. Built using
Python and Matplotlib.

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

months = ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun",
          "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec"]

revenue = [42, 58, 55, 70, 65, 80, 78, 90, 85, 95, 102, 120]
costs   = [30, 35, 33, 40, 38, 45, 44, 50, 47, 52,  55,  60]
profit  = [r - c for r, c in zip(revenue, costs)]

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 5))
fig.suptitle("SME Annual Financial Overview", fontsize=15, fontweight="bold", color="#1B2A4A")
fig.patch.set_facecolor("#F4F6FA")

# Revenue vs Costs line chart
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_facecolor("#F4F6FA")
ax1.plot(months, revenue, marker="o", linewidth=2.5, color="#1B2A4A", label="Revenue")
ax1.plot(months, costs,   marker="o", linewidth=2.5, color="#C9A84C", label="Costs")
ax1.fill_between(months, revenue, costs, alpha=0.08, color="#1B2A4A")
ax1.set_title("Revenue vs Costs (€k)", fontsize=12, color="#1B2A4A")
ax1.set_ylabel("€ (thousands)")
ax1.legend()
ax1.grid(axis="y", linestyle="--", alpha=0.4)
for spine in ax1.spines.values():
    spine.set_edgecolor("#cccccc")

# Monthly profit bar chart
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_facecolor("#F4F6FA")
bar_colors = ["#1B2A4A" if p >= 0 else "#cc3333" for p in profit]
ax2.bar(months, profit, color=bar_colors, width=0.6)
ax2.axhline(0, color="#C9A84C", linewidth=1.2, linestyle="--")
ax2.set_title("Monthly Profit (€k)", fontsize=12, color="#1B2A4A")
ax2.set_ylabel("€ (thousands)")
ax2.grid(axis="y", linestyle="--", alpha=0.4)
for spine in ax2.spines.values():
    spine.set_edgecolor("#cccccc")

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

## Key Takeaways

- **Revenue** grew steadily across the year, peaking at **€120k** in December
- **Costs** remained controlled, never exceeding 50% of revenue
- **Profit** was positive every month, reaching **€60k** in December
